ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose or functionality of the cookie */,
  "lifetime" TEXT /* Lifetime of the cookie (e.g., session, 1 year) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., HTML, Pixel Tracker) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cookie (e.g., Google) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie was created */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie expires */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain for which the cookie is valid */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is secure */,
  "is_http_only" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is HTTP only */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the advertising campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Allocated budget for the campaign */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie associated with the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "ad_format" TEXT /* Format of the advertisement (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "launch_status" TEXT /* Launch status of the campaign (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the advertisement */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with the interaction */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the user interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used for the interaction */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences regarding cookies and advertising */,
  "opt_in_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has opted-in for tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign associated with these metrics */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the advertisement was displayed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks the advertisement received */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions generated from the advertisement */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the advertisement */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the advertisement */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisement_metrics_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertisement provider (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the provider */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for the settings */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie associated with these settings */,
  "consent_given" INTEGER /* Indicates if consent is given for tracking with this cookie */,
  "opt_out_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has opted-out of tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the privacy settings were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the privacy settings were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privacy_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privacy_settings_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_audiences" (
  "audience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audience record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign targeting this audience */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the target audience */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the target audience */,
  "behaviors" TEXT /* Behaviors of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_audiences_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ad_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign using this format */,
  "format_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement format (e.g., banner, video) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the advertisement */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* Orientation of the advertisement (e.g., landscape, portrait) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ad_formats_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign regarding which feedback is provided */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments on the advertisement */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
